mschart 0.5.0.007

Package index

High level functions

mschart-package mschart
Chart Generation for 'Microsoft Word', 'Microsoft Excel' and 'Microsoft PowerPoint' Documents
ms_areachart()
Areachart object
ms_barchart()
Barchart object
ms_boxplotchart()
Boxplot chart object
ms_bubblechart()
Bubblechart object
ms_chart_combine()
Combined chart object
ms_funnelchart()
Funnel chart object
ms_histogramchart()
Histogram chart object
ms_linechart()
Linechart object
ms_paretochart()
Pareto chart object
ms_piechart()
Piechart object
ms_radarchart()
Radarchart object
ms_scatterchart()
Scatterchart object
ms_stockchart()
Stockchart object
ms_sunburstchart()
Sunburst chart object
ms_treemapchart()
Treemap chart object
ms_waterfallchart()
Waterfall chart object

Global settings

chart_settings()
Set chart options
as_bar_stack()
Set a barchart as a stacked barchart

Axis

chart_ax_x()
X axis settings
chart_ax_y()
Y axis settings

Chart titles

chart_labels()
Modify axis and plot labels

Series visual settings

chart_data_fill()
Modify fill colour
chart_data_labels()
Modify data labels settings
chart_data_line_style()
Modify line style
chart_data_line_width()
Modify line width
chart_data_size()
Modify symbol size
chart_data_smooth()
Smooth series
chart_data_stroke()
Modify marker stroke colour
chart_data_symbol()
Modify symbol
chart_labels_text()
Modify labels font settings
chart_table()
Data table settings
chart_fill_ggplot2()
Apply ggplot2 color scale
theme_ggplot2()
Apply ggplot2 theme

Global visual settings

set_theme() mschart_theme() chart_theme()
Set chart theme

Send to Microsoft Documents

print(<ms_chart>)
Print method for ms_chart
ph_with(<ms_chart>)
Add a MS Chart output into a PowerPoint object
sheet_add_drawing(<ms_chart>)
Add an ms_chart to an Excel sheet
body_add_chart()
Add a chart to a Word document

Datasets

browser_data
Dummy dataset for barchart
browser_ts
Dummy dataset for time series charts
us_indus_prod
Index of US Industrial Production
